title: Faith in Nature Hemp and Meadowfoam Conditioner
features: With vitamin E rich hemp and anti-oxidant meadowfoam this conditioner is ideal for restoring your hair
Suitable for normal to dry hair
99 Percent natural origin ingredients and 100 Percent natural fragrance
Vegan Society Approved and cruelty free hair care
description: Product Description Your hair and scalp are like a sponge so it’s important that haircare works without polluting your body (or the planet!). We’ve spent nearly 50 years perfecting ours and we’re delighted that you’ve loved them for all this time too. Established in 1974, we believe in harnessing the power of nature without harming it in the process. Our products are made using the highest quality, naturally derived, cruelty-free ingredients, with 100% natural fragrance - and they work beautifully. This restorative conditioner is a heady blend of vitamin E rich hemp and antioxidant meadowfoam, infused with ginger and essential oils of lemongrass and citrus fruits. Restoring, Normal to Dry Hair. Directions and Warnings: After shampooing, apply conditioner to damp hair. For best results leave on for 5 minutes then rinse well to remove all residue. In case of contact with eyes, rinse with clean water immediately. If irritation occurs, stop use. Keep out of reach of children. Indications For hair care Ingredients Aqua (Water), Cetearyl Alcohol*, Brassica Campestris (Rapeseed) Seed Oil*, Cannabis Sativa Seed Oil*, Limnanthes Alba (Meadowfoam) Seed Oil*, Cymbopogon Flexuosus Oil*, Cananga Odorata Flower Oil*, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis (Orange) Peel Oil*, Zingiber Officinale (Ginger) Root Oil*, Citrus Paradisi (Grapefruit) Peel Oil*, Citrus Reticulata (Tangerine) Peel Oil*, Melaleuca Alternifolia (Tea Tree) Leaf Oil*, Parfum (Fragrance)*, Cetrimonium Chloride*, Potassium Sorbate, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid*, Benzyl Alcohol*, Benzyl Benzoate*, Citral*, Geraniol*, Limonene*, Linalool* *Plant derived Directions After washing, apply the conditioner to damp hair. To achieve the best result, leave the conditioner on for 5 minutes and then rinse well. Safety Warning Discontinue if adversely affected. Keep away from children. Box Contains 1 x Faith in Nature Hemp and Meadowfoam Conditioner 400 ml See more

specifications_table.Special Features: Hemp & Meadowfoam, Normal to Dry Hair, Silicone-free, Paraben-free, SLS-free, SLES-free, Vegan Society Approved, Cruelty-free, 100% Natural Origin Aroma
